case_title: YORKE, DAVID VS CITIBANK F.S.B., LEGAL DEPARMENT C/O JOHN HANCOCK

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $412.50 FILED BY YORKE, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT CITIBANK F.S.B., LEGAL DEPARMENT C/O JOHN HANCOCK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-29-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YORKE, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITIBANK F.S.B., LEGAL DEPARMENT C/O JOHN HANCOCK $412.50 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $427.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
